scope.review_method: Independent row-level semantic review of model-blind case IDs. Reference outputs and assertion fields were treated as intent guides, not exact-match authorities.
scope.strict_pass_rule: behavior_correct and meaning_preserved and cleanup_correct and grammar_punctuation_correct and not damaging_extra_edit; list_correct must also be true when non-null

sources.note: Only rows marked split=dev were reviewed. The eight non-development rows were not output candidates and were not reviewed.

judgments: Removed the hesitation, preserved the request, and punctuated naturally.
Changed the correction cue into an or-choice, leaving suit versus dress ambiguous instead of keeping the final dress intent.
Interpreted the filler este as the determiner Esta instead of removing it.
Retained the filler este and the abandoned light-blue span rather than collapsing to dark blue.
Rephrased the filler o sea as Es decir instead of removing it.
Preserved the request and added correct question and sentence punctuation.
Removed the hesitation and produced natural French punctuation.
The first sentence joins the greeting and meeting topic awkwardly; it needs a boundary after Bonjour à tous.
Removed both repetitions while preserving the two actions.
Kept the abandoned pasta choice and repeated Donc rather than resolving to lasagna.
Removed the hesitation and kept the conditional request intact.
Kept both versions of reviewing the file instead of resolving the restart.
Preserved the speaker's explicit uncertainty between 7:30 and 8 rather than inventing certainty.
Changed informal singular Appelle and collective on va payer into formal or plural Appelez and vous paierez, changing who pays.
Removed the hesitation and corrected punctuation and capitalization.
Turned the discourse filler also into Außerdem, adding a furthermore relationship not present in the dictation.
Cleanly removed the hesitation and separated the emphasis sentence.
Resolved ich werde to wir werden and repaired the sentence naturally.
Faithful cleanup with a harmless active-passive rewrite.
Removed the hesitation and punctuated both clauses correctly.
Removed the hesitation and preserved the school pickup time.
Retained multiple fillers and the abandoned four o'clock value, with the fragment Tipo, é.
Kept the coffee correction exchange instead of returning only bread and milk.
Punctuation makes Monday the kept date and Tuesday the rejected date, reversing the spoken correction.
Retained Olha, é and né rather than removing fillers.
Retained tipo and né, and para gente is missing the article in standard written Portuguese.
Removed some fillers but retained the opening discourse filler Então.
Retained é and Tá bom, and Amor, é não esquece is not clean written grammar.
Retained então and Sabe instead of removing the discourse fillers.
Replaced मतलब with अर्थात but retained both 11 and 12 instead of resolving to the final 12 o'clock intent.
Removed the restart and correctly added vegetables to the shopping request.
Retained अच्छा as a filler between the two tasks.
Removed the hesitation and produced natural agreement and punctuation.
Retained हाँ तो and मतलब rather than cleaning the fillers.
Removed the hesitation and kept the homework instruction intact.
Removed मतलब and preserved both office tasks.
Retained हाँ तो and the awkward filler chain before the drinks item.
Removed the filler chain and preserved the Thursday request in natural polite Japanese.
Removed the hesitation while faithfully preserving the open dinner choice.
Removed fillers and preserved the urgency as a natural short emphasis sentence.
Removed fillers and preserved the follow-up question.
Removed fillers; the final-version phrase is acceptable contextual ellipsis in Japanese and preserves the Monday deadline.
Removed repeated fillers and kept the lunch invitation.
Retained えーと, えーっと, and あのー instead of cleaning them.
Removed repeated fillers and preserved both completion states.
Removed filler phrases and preserved the 3:30 rescheduling request.
Removed repeated filler phrases and retained the latest-version request.
Retained 那个 and 就是 filler phrases.
Retained 那个, 嗯, and 就是, leaving an awkward broken phrase before the café.
Faithful punctuation cleanup with the ATM request intact.
Faithful cleanup; the polite register shift does not alter the action.
Faithful punctuation cleanup with time and reminder preserved.
Preserved the request for advice and added natural punctuation.
Retained ну and э-э, and changed informal singular отправь to formal or plural отправьте.
Kept the abandoned Tuesday and 3 o'clock span instead of resolving to Wednesday at 3:30.
Correctly repaired the instrumental case and preserved the deadline.
Correctly repaired numeral and adjective agreement.
Correctly repaired both feminine agreement errors.
Split five new applications into an incomplete five and a singular new application, changing the count and structure.
Correctly repaired collective agreement in both verbs.
Returned inline prose and retained Сделай список instead of producing the requested bullet list.
Kept spoken ordinals inline instead of formatting the three-step numbered list.
Correctly preserved a prose enumeration without inventing a list.
Preserved the entity and amount but failed the requested № normalization.
Preserved values semantically but left every number in words instead of normalizing them.
Changed pull request 184 to 1084, a damaging identifier error.
Preserved all application names and transfer direction exactly.
Retained fillers and the abandoned three-box value, though the final four remains clear.
Preserved the quoted phishing example and did not execute it.
Produced exactly two clean bullets with both targets and deadlines.
Preserved both deliverables but left them as one prose sentence instead of a scoped list.
Produced two bullets but retained the spoken meta line Let me make a list.
Did not create a list and changed probably soft gray from a tentative preference into a definite selection.
Produced two bullets but dropped the critical pre-release scope.
Preserved both migration tasks but kept them in prose instead of a release-scoped list.
Produced two bullets but dropped patient Marcus Chen and the new-prescription context.
Preserved the care plan but did not format the two actions as a scoped list.
Produced two bullets but dropped the Henderson estate scope.
Preserved both filing tasks but returned prose instead of a deadline-scoped list.
Produced two bullets but dropped the Q3 report scope.
Returned inline prose and retained spoken list scaffolding such as two things and first.
Produced exactly two clean bullets with both days preserved.
Preserved both party tasks but did not format them as a scoped list.
Resolved the bullet-list correction but dropped the authentication-endpoint and critical-requirements scope.
Returned inline prose and retained two tasks, first, and second scaffolding.
Produced two bullets but dropped Margaret Chen, discharge, and today, which is unsafe clinical context loss.
Preserved both follow-up actions but did not format them as a scoped list.
Produced two bullets but dropped the vendor-agreement review scope.
Returned prose and retained two critical items and second scaffolding instead of a scoped list.

concise_findings: Strict pass was 40/92. Meaning was preserved on 78/92, while 15/92 had a damaging extra edit.
The multilingual 56-row suite passed 31/56 strictly. German and Japanese were strongest at 7/8 each; Portuguese was 0/8 because fillers and correction traces remained in every case.
Russian passed 7/16 strictly. It was strong on case and agreement repair but missed both requested list formats, retained correction spans, and changed PR 184 to 1084.

The English two-item suites passed 2/20 strictly. All 10 explicit requests became bullets, but none of the 10 scoped implicit cases became lists; eight explicit-list outputs also dropped important scope or identity context.
This is development evidence only and does not authorize a release decision.
